hero.title: Never miss a booking again
hero.subtitle: Receply answers your phone calls 24/7, books appointments automatically, and updates your dashboard in real time — for any service business.

animation.line1: Hello, Bright Smile Dental. How can I help?
animation.line2: Hi, I'd like to book a checkup for Friday at 3pm.
animation.line3: Let me check… Friday at 3pm is available. What's the name?
animation.bookedSubtitle: Anna's appointment has been added to your dashboard.
animation.ariaLabel: Demo of Receply handling an incoming call

featuresSection.title: Everything your business needs
featuresSection.subtitle: From the first ring to the confirmed booking — fully automated.

phone.title: 24/7 Phone Answering
phone.description: Your AI receptionist picks up every call, day or night, weekends included — for clinics, salons, barber shops, and more.

booking.title: Instant Booking
booking.description: Customers book appointments naturally over the phone. No apps, no forms, no friction.

realtime.title: Real-time Dashboard
realtime.description: Every booking appears on your dashboard the moment the call ends. Always up to date.

recordings.title: Call Recordings
recordings.description: Review every call with full transcripts and audio recordings. Never lose important details.

setup.title: Instant Setup
setup.description: Get your AI receptionist up and running in minutes. No technical knowledge required.

secure.title: Secure & Private
secure.description: Customer data is encrypted and stored securely. Full compliance with privacy regulations.

step1.title: Customer calls your number
step1.description: Your dedicated phone number rings and Receply answers immediately.

step2.title: AI collects the details
step2.description: The AI receptionist naturally gathers name, date, time, and reason for visit.

step3.title: Booking confirmed instantly
step3.description: The appointment is confirmed on the call and appears on your dashboard in seconds.

pricingSection.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricingSection.subtitle: One plan. Everything included. No surprises.
pricingSection.description: Everything you need to automate your reception.
pricingSection.note: Start with 15 free minutes. No credit card required.

ctaSection.title: Ready to automate your business?
ctaSection.subtitle: Join service businesses already saving hours every week with Receply.

language.title: Choose your language
language.subtitle: You can change this at any time.

industry.question: What kind of business do you run?
industry.subtitle: We'll customize your AI receptionist based on your industry.

name.question: What's your business called?
name.subtitle: Your AI receptionist will introduce itself using this name.

tone.question: How do you talk to your customers?
tone.subtitle: Your AI will match this tone in every conversation.

busiestTime.question: When do most of your customers call?
busiestTime.subtitle: This helps us optimize your assistant's availability.

mainGoal.question: What's your biggest headache right now?
mainGoal.subtitle: We'll make sure your AI tackles this first.
